markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review Redis's current SEO strategy and performance to align on a new plan.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance Crisis:** Organic traffic has been declining since April, with a 5% QoQ session drop and a 30% QoQ conversion rate decline.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [**Process Bottleneck:** A 2–3 month internal content approval process limits output to \~4 articles per quarter, creating a large backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [**GrowthX Mandate:** Take over all SEO content production (net new & refreshes) to scale output to \~5 pieces/week and reverse performance trends.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [**Strategic Focus:** Drive AI authority and balance the content funnel. The plan will leverage high-intent ChatGPT traffic (up 250% QoQ) while fixing the high-volume, low-converting glossary page.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance & Challenges

  - [**Organic Traffic Decline:** Steady decline since April.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [**Conversion Rate Drop:** Organic conversion rate down 30% QoQ.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [**Glossary Page Underperformance:**](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
      - [Traffic cut in half over 18 months (20k → 10k sessions/mo).](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
      - [High traffic, but low conversion due to top-of-funnel (ToFu) content.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
  - [**ChatGPT Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
      - [Up 250% QoQ, driving the highest conversion rate of all channels.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
      - [This high-intent traffic is a key growth opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)

### Content Strategy & Process

  - [**Current Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
      - [A 2–3 month approval cycle (PMM → Brand → Web Team) limits output to \~4 articles/quarter.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
      - [This has created a large backlog of unproduced content in the "SEO Strategy Master Sheet."](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [**GrowthX Mandate:**](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
      - [Fully own all SEO content production (net new & refreshes).](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
      - [Scale output to \~5 pieces/week.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
      - [The goal is for Redis teams (PMM, Brand) to be completely hands-off.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [**Content Priorities:**](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
      - [**High-Performing:** Technical deep-dives (e.g., "AI agent memory," "fuzzy matching") and data-driven competitor analyses.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
      - [**Strategic Focus:** Build authority in AI infrastructure.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Funnel Balance:** Address the current imbalance by creating more middle-of-funnel (MoFu) and bottom-of-funnel (BoFu) content.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)

### Implementation Plan

  - [**Content Management:** GrowthX will use Airtable as its "Content OS" to manage the full production pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [**Keyword Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [GrowthX will conduct a keyword gap analysis to find competitor keywords Redis doesn't rank for.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [This will inform a new, focused target keyword list.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
      - [Redis's Ahrefs account has \~200 slots open to track these new keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
  - [**Reporting:** GrowthX will build a 7-page Looker dashboard to track performance by topic cluster, pulling data from GA4 and GSC.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1977.0)
      - [Present initial topic clusters for approval next week.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
      - [Build the 7-page Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
      - [Refine writing guidelines with Allison (Brand) and share with Redis.](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1353.0)
  - [**Fung-Lin:**](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1977.0)
      - [Secure and share access to key PMM documents:](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1977.0)
          - [Customer insights/ICP analysis](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1977.0)
          - ["Redis for AI" FY26 deck](https://fathom.video/share/ggVrRquDfKnSfyyvbg1YBzzzXLWn4yNS?tab=summary&timestamp=1977.0)
